name: mirofish
description: MiroFish - 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:backend: cd backend && uv sync && uv pip install --python .venv/bin/python --no-deps graphiti-core==0.28.2
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run --no-sync python run.py
